debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

failed_attempts:
cases M with
  | zero =>
    simp [RiemannSum]
    bound
  | succ M =>
    rw [← RiemannSum_sub]
    calc |RiemannSum (f n - F) a b (M + 1)|
      _ ≤ RiemannSum (fun x ↦ |f n x - F x|) a b (M + 1) := RiemannSum_abs_le _ _ _ _
      _ < RiemannSum (fun x ↦ ε / (b - a)) a b (M + 1) := RiemannSum_lt_of_lt hab hN
      _ = ε := by rw [RiemannSum_const]; field_simp; bound
